results.title: David Beckham sends message to Spain over World Cup success
results.description: David Beckham sends message to Spain over World Cup successDavid Beckham is taking pride in Spain after the team won the 2026 FIFA World Cup.The former England captain shared a message on Instagram after Spain beat defending champions Argentina 1-0 in Sunday's final."World champions. results.title: 'Ramayana' release date revealed in trailer? Ranbir Kapoor, Yash starrer set for November 8 release, to CLASH with 'Godzilla: Minus Zero'
results.description: The Ramayana film trailer has garnered positive reactions from industry insiders. A recent review suggests a November 8 release date for the epic. This potential release date sets up a box office clash with Godzilla: Minus Zero. Godzilla: Minus Zero is scheduled to open globally on November 6, 2026. Both films are highly anticipated cinematic spectacles for 2026.
